steps: Contact BNP Paribas Securities to report EUR 3,744.00 overpayment on TotalEnergies SE dividend for account 901234567
Reference FR-NO tax treaty Article 10 specifying 15% withholding rate versus the 13.5% apparently applied
Request custodian review their treaty rate calculation and process refund of excess withholding tax
Provide supporting documentation showing correct 15% treaty rate should result in EUR 212,160.00 net payment
